name: suews
description: Run, validate, and analyse SUEWS urban climate simulations from your AI assistant

interface.longDescription: SUEWS (Surface Urban Energy and Water Balance Scheme) is a neighbourhood-scale urban land-surface model. This plugin gives your AI assistant the workflow rules, forcing-data checks, output interpretation guidance, and common-error diagnostics needed to run, validate, and analyse SUEWS simulations.
interface.developerName: UMEP-dev (UCL Department of Risk and Disaster Reduction)
